history.title: How to Build a Monster Truck
history.description: "How to Build a Monster Truckby Peggy Deland A monster truck is a normal-sized truck body with abnormally large tires and oversized suspension to accommodate them. Most monster trucks are used as show cars or conversation pieces, although some are used for demonstrations and ""monster truck shows""
